meaning: n.男子名,古代罗马教皇之名
examples: Why are you so chicken, Gregory?
Gregory poured another glass of white wine and went back to his bedroom.
Pope Gregory III designated November 1st as All Saints' Day, a time to honor saints and martyrs.
This lethal mix cultivates a thriving underbelly that author Gregory David Roberts brings to life.
The Bear Stearns group includes Gregory Hanley and Alan Mintz, former co-heads of the distressed-debt group.
